market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.23%, Nasdaq +0.71%, Dow -0.32%. Technology led sectors (+5.02%) while Communication Services lagged (-1.37%). Claude Opus 4.6 led the day at -0.11%. 0 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +14.30%. Key headline: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders to vote on Paramount deal - CNBC — market reaction muted.
